executionArgs.additionalInstruction:
Execute 35 frontend UI tests for the Admin module on http://localhost:3000. 
Use the built-in browser automation. 
Login credentials: admin@mxperformance.com.br / Mx#2026!. 
The tests involve logging in and navigating through modules like /painel, /lojas, /configuracoes, and /legacy/*. 
For EACH test, ensure you wait for the page to fully load and verify that elements specific to that page are rendered (e.g., titles, tables, charts).
All 35 tests must be attempted. Do NOT use Python Playwright directly if it is not available in the environment; use the tool's native frontend execution capabilities.
